morning_1: What am I grateful for today?
morning_2: What are my top priorities for the day?
morning_3: How can I make today successful and fulfilling?
morning_4: What positive mindset or attitude can I adopt today?
morning_5: How can I take care of my physical and mental well-being today?
evening_1: What were my accomplishments and successes today?
evening_2: What challenges did I face and how did I handle them?
evening_3: Did I live up to my values and principles today?
evening_4: What lessons did I learn from today"s experiences?
evening_5: How can I improve or adjust my approach for tomorrow?
weekly_1: What were my major achievements and progress this week?
weekly_2: Did I meet my weekly goals and objectives?
weekly_3: What tasks or projects are still pending and need attention?
weekly_4: What obstacles or setbacks did I encounter and how can I overcome them?
weekly_5: How can I make next week more productive and fulfilling?
monthly_1: What were my biggest accomplishments and milestones this month?
monthly_2: Did I achieve the goals I set at the beginning of the month?
monthly_3: What areas of my life or work need improvement or adjustment?
monthly_4: How did I manage my time and priorities this month?
monthly_5: What can I do differently or better in the upcoming month?
miq_1: What do you want to experience in life?
miq_2: How do you want to grow and develop yourself?
miq_3: How do you want to contribute to the world?
title: Title
fail_delete: The account deletion process was either unsuccessful or only partially successful!
splash_1: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
splash_3: Life is not always perfect, but that doesn’t mean you can’t enjoy it.
splash_4: The most important thing in life is not what you have, but who you are.
splash_6: The key to happiness is to find what you love to do and make it your profession.
splash_8: Life is too short to waste it on things you don’t love.
splash_9: The best way to start a new day is to forgive yourself for the past.
splash_10: The best way to overcome fear is to confront it.
splash_12: The best way to make a dream come true is to wake up and start working on it.
splash_14: The best way to find yourself is to lose yourself in something greater.
splash_16: The best way to find love is to be loving.
splash_18: The best way to learn is to teach.
splash_20: The best way to start over is to stop trying to start over.
splash_22: The best way to stop worrying is to start doing something.
splash_24: The best way to combat lies is with truth.
splash_26: The best way to succeed is to believe that you can.
splash_28: The best way to feel blessed is to acknowledge your blessings.
splash_29: The best way to make the world a better place is to start with yourself.
splash_31: If you want to achieve something, you must be willing to work hard.
splash_33: Everything is possible if you just believe in yourself.
splash_35: If you’re not trying, you’re already losing.
splash_37: The only way to succeed is to try.
splash_39: If you can’t imagine it, you can’t achieve it.
splash_41: Life is what happens to you while you’re busy making other plans.
splash_43: If you can’t make it happen, find someone who can.
splash_45: The best way to start is to stop talking and start doing.
splash_47: If you don’t like something, change it. If you can’t change it, change your attitude towards it.
splash_49: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
splash_51: The best way to feel good about yourself is to help others feel good about themselves.
splash_52: If you want to be successful, you must be willing to fail.
splash_53: If you don’t believe in yourself, no one else will.
splash_54: The best way to look forward is to focus on what you want to achieve, not what you fear.
